info.title: RepoClean
info.description: A tool for cleaning up repository folders.

options.name: --recursive
options.description: (Default: false) Clean from folders and all subfolders

options.name: --forced
options.description: (Default: false) Do not ask before deleting

options.name: --show
options.description:
(Default: false) Only display the ones that would be deleted,
but dont actually delete any.

options.name: --extra
options.description: Extra set of patterns to look for
